MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BEATRICE ELAURIA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is denied. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (301/AJR) Judge A. James Robertson II, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
